nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Template environment configuration defining the LLM provider selection (bedrock or ollama), AWS Bedrock credentials and model ID, and Ollama local endpoint settings. AWS credentials presence auto-selects Bedrock; missing credentials fall back to Ollama.
nodes.languageNotes: Supports two mutually exclusive LLM providers via a single LLM_PROVIDER variable with automatic fallback logic based on credential presence.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive project documentation covering setup for both Ollama (free local) and AWS Bedrock (production) LLM providers, backend and frontend startup instructions, CLI usage, project directory structure, and a high-level explanation of how the LangGraph multi-agent orchestration works.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python dependency manifest listing the core runtime packages: LangChain, LangGraph, FastAPI, Uvicorn, boto3 for AWS Bedrock, langchain-ollama for local models, httpx, and python-dotenv for environment management.
